title: PCR array results of pig lungs undergoing ex vivo lung perfusion following warm ischemia
author: Schwartz-Cornil, isabelle
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Resilience of Lung Grafts to Warm Ischemia: Assessment  by Ex Vivo Perfusion using Functional and Molecular Analysis . Statistical analysis of the gene expression fold changes (FC)  of the differentially expressed genes (DEG) versus "Time of Death". In the "Tac array genes" tab,  the predesigned primers from ThermoFisher with their reference and functional category is listed.  In the "DEG list" tab, the DEG lists  identified in  the different conditions (group, time) are shown, along with  their raw and adjusted p-values (< 0.1). In the  "Individual values" tab,  the  FC  of the DEGs are reported for each sample of the control and WI group, at 0, 2, 4, 6 hour. In the "statistical comparison vs WI 0H" tab, the  results of the statistical comparisons of the FC between the different EVLP conditions and the one of the WI 0H condition are reported.
